jokes.text: Suddenly now white lives matter?
jokes.setup: Someone says they had to see Selina
jokes.punchline: Selina sarcastically implies they only care about white people now
jokes.explanation: Sharp political satire that's perfectly in Selina's character - cynical, cutting, and racially provocative

jokes.text: What is the host of Christmas past doing here?
jokes.setup: Someone appears at Selina's location
jokes.punchline: Selina compares them to a ghostly Christmas spirit, implying they're from her past
jokes.explanation: Clever literary reference that shows Selina's wit and disdain for unwanted visitors

jokes.text: 'Cause all this learning is giving me a yamaka-ache.
jokes.setup: Character is converting to Judaism and mentions all the learning involved
jokes.punchline: Combines 'yarmulke' with 'headache' to make a pun about Jewish conversion being difficult
jokes.explanation: Solid pun that works on multiple levels - sounds like headache but references Jewish religious item

jokes.text: Well, why should her cervix be any different than the rest of her?
jokes.setup: Marjorie announces Catherine has been diagnosed with an incompetent cervix
jokes.punchline: Selina cruelly suggests her daughter's cervix is incompetent like everything else about her
jokes.explanation: Perfectly cruel and perfectly Selina - takes medical terminology and makes it a vicious character attack on her own daughter

jokes.text: She has a penis?
jokes.setup: Someone mentions Catherine and Jaffar have taken a break from penetrative sex
jokes.punchline: Selina completely misunderstands and thinks Catherine has male anatomy
jokes.explanation: Simple misdirection joke that works because Selina genuinely doesn't understand the medical situation

jokes.text: Did you put a towel or anything underneath her? Because, girls, this is imported French linen.
jokes.setup: Catherine is on bed rest on Selina's couch
jokes.punchline: Selina is more concerned about her expensive furniture than her pregnant daughter's health
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment showing Selina's warped priorities - material possessions over family

jokes.text: or even a garbage bag, you know, in case she leaks.
jokes.setup: Selina suggests putting something under Catherine to protect the furniture
jokes.punchline: She escalates to suggesting a garbage bag and using dehumanizing language about her daughter
jokes.explanation: Escalates the cruelty and shows Selina treating her daughter like a leaky appliance

jokes.text: You could get murdered in my country for saying something like that.
jokes.setup: Someone mentions the book title 'First Woman'
jokes.punchline: Jaffar casually mentions extreme punishment for female empowerment in his country
jokes.explanation: Dark humor that reveals character background while commenting on women's rights globally

jokes.text: From the moment I entered the the White House.
jokes.setup: Amy points out there's a typo on the first page of Selina's book
jokes.punchline: The first sentence has a glaring double 'the' error
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective gag about incompetence - a typo in the very first sentence of a presidential memoir

jokes.text: Now that's a pun!
jokes.setup: Richard says 'ahlan wa sahlan' in Arabic
jokes.punchline: Richard enthusiastically declares his Arabic greeting is a pun when it's not
jokes.explanation: Richard's misunderstanding of what constitutes a pun is perfectly in character

jokes.text: Which, again, is tomorrow night, not tonight, despite the title.
jokes.setup: Richard mentions Selina is doing The Tonight Show tomorrow
jokes.punchline: He unnecessarily clarifies that despite being called 'Tonight Show' it's tomorrow
jokes.explanation: Classic Richard over-explanation of something obvious, perfectly in character

jokes.text: Whatever happened to half a bottle of red wine and three Virginia Slims?
jokes.setup: Discussion of Catherine's healthy herbal uterine tea
jokes.punchline: Selina fondly recalls the old days of pregnancy with alcohol and cigarettes
jokes.explanation: Perfectly captures Selina's generational attitude and casual disregard for health advice

jokes.text: My cervix is as tight as a snare drum.
jokes.setup: Catherine defends herself when Selina says she's on bed rest
jokes.punchline: Catherine uses an uncomfortably specific and inappropriate metaphor for her cervix
jokes.explanation: Deeply uncomfortable overshare that's perfect for Catherine's character and the show's cringe comedy

jokes.text: I once dry-shaved that woman's legs under her desk during a cabinet meeting.
jokes.setup: Gary complains he's not mentioned in Selina's book until page 134
jokes.punchline: He describes an extremely inappropriate and servile act he performed for Selina
jokes.explanation: Perfectly captures Gary's pathetic devotion while being hilariously inappropriate and specific

jokes.text: I know how to spell my last name, Kent.
jokes.setup: Kent starts to help Jonah spell Ryan
jokes.punchline: Jonah defensively insists he knows how to spell his own name
jokes.explanation: Shows Jonah's insecurity but the joke itself is fairly basic

jokes.text: Are you fucking kidding? I'm not in here. I ruined her administration, like, four times. You'd think that'd count for something.
jokes.setup: Jonah discovers he's not mentioned in Selina's book
jokes.punchline: He's proud of how much damage he caused and expects recognition for it
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jonah logic - expecting credit for being destructive, completely missing the point

jokes.text: The shutdown really hurt you in Massachusetts' anus. AKA New Hampshire.
jokes.setup: Kent is delivering polling data to Jonah
jokes.punchline: He makes a crude anatomical comparison for New Hampshire's geographic position
jokes.explanation: Unexpected crude humor from the usually clinical Kent, delivered completely deadpan

jokes.text: Whoa, I'm only up five on Skeevy Deevy?
jokes.setup: Kent tells Jonah he's only up 5 points against Selectman Di Vicentis
jokes.punchline: Jonah uses a childish nickname that rhymes
jokes.explanation: Perfectly juvenile for Jonah but the rhyming nickname is fairly basic humor

jokes.text: I went to summer camp with that dude and he was too afraid to get changed in front of the other boys.
jokes.setup: Jonah tries to insult his political opponent
jokes.punchline: He describes behavior that would actually apply to himself given his own insecurities
jokes.explanation: Works on multiple levels - shows Jonah's projection and lack of self-awareness

jokes.text: It was you. How do you know, Kent? Were you at that summer camp?
jokes.setup: Kent corrects Jonah about who was afraid to change at camp
jokes.punchline: Jonah defensively questions how Kent would know this information
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Jonah's defensiveness when caught in projection

jokes.text: Are you out of your fucking mind? I still have my trust.
jokes.setup: Jonah asks if Shawnee gave up her inheritance for him
jokes.punchline: She reveals she's not actually sacrificing anything financially
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection that deflates Jonah's romantic notion while revealing character motivations

jokes.text: I mean, Jane... I will always remember Jane covering the moon landing. I mean, I studied that footage. That beautiful black and white stuff.
jokes.setup: Dan tries to give a heartfelt goodbye to Jane
jokes.punchline: He accidentally implies Jane is old enough to have covered the 1969 moon landing
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dan moment - trying to be gracious but accidentally insulting someone's age

jokes.text: I told them you didn't want cake.
jokes.setup: Dan suggests having goodbye cake
jokes.punchline: Someone reveals they preemptively told people Dan didn't want cake
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective beat about workplace passive-aggression

jokes.text: It's kind of like the wave in 'The Perfect Storm,' except in this case, the wave is made out of shit and our boat is also made out of shit.
jokes.setup: Selina asks if the Washington Post exposé is bad
jokes.punchline: Amy uses an elaborate metaphor where everything is made of excrement
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalating metaphor that perfectly captures the hopelessness of their situation

jokes.text: This isn't an article, this is a gang bang on a pinball machine!
jokes.setup: Selina is reading the devastating Washington Post article
jokes.punchline: She uses an elaborate sexual metaphor to describe how brutal the coverage is
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly crude and specific metaphor that's perfectly Selina - vulgar but creative

jokes.text: What have you and your 47 tangled chromosomes done?!
jokes.setup: Selina discovers Mike's diary is the source of the leak
jokes.punchline: She insults Mike by suggesting he has genetic abnormalities
jokes.explanation: Creative insult that combines medical terminology with character attack, very Selina

jokes.text: I should've gotten a diary with a little lock on it, but I didn't wanna lock myself out.
jokes.setup: Mike apologizes for not securing his diary
jokes.punchline: He reveals he was worried about locking himself out of his own diary
jokes.explanation: Perfect Mike logic - worried about a completely absurd scenario that reveals his incompetence

jokes.text: Well, now it's on top of you, it's knocked your teeth out, and it's making sweet love to your face!
jokes.setup: Amy and Gary claim they thought they were on top of the diary situation
jokes.punchline: Selina uses violent sexual metaphor to describe how badly they've been defeated
jokes.explanation: Another brilliantly vulgar Selina metaphor that escalates the sexual imagery from earlier

jokes.text: God, get out of here, you great walrus Judas!
jokes.setup: Selina is furious at Mike for the diary leak
jokes.punchline: She combines animal insult with biblical betrayer reference
jokes.explanation: Creative compound insult that's both physical and moral, quintessentially Selina

jokes.text: What's up, white boys? Yo, you guys ready to drop that rock?
jokes.setup: Jonah enters a Congressional basketball game
jokes.punchline: He tries to sound cool with awkward urban slang that doesn't fit him
jokes.explanation: Perfect cringe moment showing Jonah's desperate attempts to be cool and athletic

jokes.text: Oh, God, who the fuck invited Dikembe Mutomtard?
jokes.setup: Someone tall enters the basketball game
jokes.punchline: Jonah combines basketball player name with 'mustard' as an insult
jokes.explanation: Reasonably clever name-mashing that fits Jonah's juvenile humor style

jokes.text: Even Kobe Bryant wouldn't rape you in those things.
jokes.setup: Will advises Jonah not to wear certain shorts
jokes.punchline: He makes an extremely dark reference to Kobe Bryant's legal troubles
jokes.explanation: Dark humor that relies on real-world controversy, more shocking than clever

jokes.text: Balls are the only thing keeping me from choking on cocks. Without balls, I'd be swallowing dicks whole just like Joey Chestnut.
jokes.setup: Jonah takes away the basketball
jokes.punchline: Will makes an absurd sexual metaphor comparing basketball to preventing oral sex
jokes.explanation: Absurdist humor that's crude but has internal logic with the Joey Chestnut reference

jokes.text: My presidency just got caught with a tranny hooker on Sunset Boulevard, and I have to make America think that I was just giving her a ride home.
jokes.setup: Selina explains the need for damage control
jokes.punchline: She uses an elaborate metaphor about scandal management using prostitution
jokes.explanation: Elaborate and specific metaphor that captures political spin perfectly, though uses dated terminology

jokes.text: In sleeping with my trainer, I think you could say I did not exercise good judgment.
jokes.setup: Amy writes a Tonight Show joke about Selina's trainer scandal
jokes.punchline: She makes a pun combining 'exercise' with 'judgment'
jokes.explanation: Solid pun that works for TV but not particularly original or clever

jokes.text: And maybe give him some of that lesbian cooze potion.
jokes.setup: Selina suggests making Leon West wait and giving him refreshments
jokes.punchline: She crudely refers to Catherine's uterine tea with vulgar language
jokes.explanation: Perfectly crude Selina callback that combines homophobia with gynecological humor

jokes.text: You sound like the world's gayest AM radio show.
jokes.setup: Gary and Amy are discussing the tea situation
jokes.punchline: Selina compares their conversation to a stereotypically masculine radio format
jokes.explanation: Sharp observational humor that contrasts their mundane conversation with macho radio

jokes.text: Come on, nobody's asking you to engage in some sort of human pleasurable activity. I know that's not your bag.
jokes.setup: Selina suggests Amy flirt with Leon West
jokes.punchline: She cruelly implies Amy is incapable of normal human pleasure/sexuality
jokes.explanation: Viciously personal attack disguised as reasonable request, perfectly captures Selina's cruelty

jokes.text: One of these days, she's gonna make that face and that eyeball of hers is gonna pop out and shoot across the room.
jokes.setup: Amy makes her characteristic angry face
jokes.punchline: Selina describes an absurd physical consequence of Amy's facial expressions
jokes.explanation: Vivid and absurd physical comedy description that builds on Amy's established character trait

jokes.text: Woodward minus Bernstein plus Propecia.
jokes.setup: Leon West enters the room
jokes.punchline: Selina describes him as a famous investigative reporter but with hair loss medication
jokes.explanation: Brilliant mathematical formula joke that's both literary and personal, perfectly economical

jokes.text: and I do 'cause I slept with him for two years...
jokes.setup: Selina mentions remembering her law school tort professor
jokes.punchline: She casually reveals she had an affair with him, undermining her legal credibility
jokes.explanation: Perfect Selina overshare that undermines her authority while revealing character history

jokes.text: You can have Amy. You can have her. Probably better from behind, though, you know...
jokes.setup: Leon West wants to leave the meeting
jokes.punchline: Selina literally offers Amy sexually to Leon with crude positioning advice
jokes.explanation: Shockingly inappropriate moment that shows Selina's desperation and complete disregard for Amy

jokes.text: It is a toxic infant blowout out both diaper legs and up the back of the onesie.
jokes.setup: Amy says it's beyond a dump referring to the news
jokes.punchline: She uses an elaborate baby defecation metaphor to describe the scale of the scandal
jokes.explanation: Extremely vivid and specific metaphor that perfectly captures the mess they're in

jokes.text: We were telling so many lies, I had to write them down to keep them straight. Any decent lawyer would've told me to do that.
jokes.setup: Mike explains why he kept the diary that got them in trouble
jokes.punchline: He thinks documenting lies was good legal advice, completely missing the point
jokes.explanation: Perfect Mike logic - thinking the worst possible advice was actually good advice

jokes.text: I was a patsy, but to my knowledge, this is just the tip of the iceberg. These revelations will continue to come out in a steady drip, drip, drip... like the leaky prison faucet I was forced to drink from.
jokes.setup: Mike gives a TV interview about the scandal
jokes.punchline: He uses a prison metaphor that accidentally makes him sound guilty
jokes.explanation: Mike's terrible media skills on display - using prison imagery while claiming innocence

jokes.text: Although, actually, one time, Andrew did hide one of his women in the closet, so she had reason to be somewhat alarmed.
jokes.setup: Selina mentions Catherine was scared of monsters in the closet as a child
jokes.punchline: She casually reveals her ex-husband actually did hide his affairs in the closet
jokes.explanation: Dark revelation that reframes childhood fear as justified, perfectly casual delivery

jokes.text: Why is your plane always fueled? Well, you know, in case... Let's just say that I've got some cousins... who sometimes get very angry at some of your tall buildings.
jokes.setup: Selina asks why Jaffar's plane is always ready
jokes.punchline: Jaffar hints at family connections to terrorism before claiming it's a joke
jokes.explanation: Dark humor that plays with stereotypes and real fears, though relies on shock value

jokes.text: Amy committed perjury today, written in crayon and mustard stains.
jokes.setup: Selina imagines what Mike's diary contains
jokes.punchline: She describes serious legal accusations written in childish materials
jokes.explanation: Perfect contrast between serious content and ridiculous medium, captures Mike's incompetence

jokes.text: I thought about teaching high school, but, I mean, girls these days just can't keep a secret.
jokes.setup: Dan discusses potential career moves
jokes.punchline: He implies inappropriate relationships with students while blaming them
jokes.explanation: Dark humor that's more disturbing than clever, relies mainly on shock value

jokes.text: Yeah, she's telling Page Six that she and Brie are clam slamming. Vaginas are so gross. I wish I didn't have one. Sometimes I forget I do.
jokes.setup: Discussion of Jane's publicity tactics
jokes.punchline: Dan makes crude lesbian reference then reveals his own gender confusion
jokes.explanation: Reveals Dan's confusion about his own gender/sexuality in characteristic crude way

jokes.text: Well, the history books are being rewritten, and this time, it's not Texas saying Satan made fossils.
jokes.setup: Positive news coverage about Tibet revelation
jokes.punchline: Selina contrasts real historical revision with religious fundamentalism
jokes.explanation: Sharp political satire about education and science denial, perfectly delivered

jokes.text: God bless the media and their 'fly hitting a windshield' attention span!
jokes.setup: The media is focusing on Tibet instead of other scandals
jokes.punchline: Gary uses a vivid metaphor for short attention spans
jokes.explanation: Excellent metaphor that captures media attention perfectly, very visual

jokes.text: Take that cum shot in all four eyes, Leon.
jokes.setup: Leon West is being criticized on TV
jokes.punchline: Selina uses crude sexual metaphor referencing Leon's glasses
jokes.explanation: Crude but clever reference to glasses as 'four eyes' combined with sexual imagery

jokes.text: It's gonna put a real turd in her chalupa.
jokes.setup: Discussion of how Montez will react to Tibet news
jokes.punchline: Selina combines excrement with Mexican food reference
jokes.explanation: Silly but effective food metaphor that's perfectly Selina's crude style

jokes.text: The three Meyersketeers hang a shingle?
jokes.setup: Ben suggests starting a consulting business
jokes.punchline: He combines 'Three Musketeers' with Selina's last name
jokes.explanation: Solid wordplay that works but isn't particularly innovative

jokes.text: Shut the fuck up, you epileptic Picasso painting!
jokes.setup: Uncle Jeff is angry at Jonah
jokes.punchline: He combines medical condition with art reference to insult Jonah's appearance
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly creative insult that combines high art with medical condition perfectly

jokes.text: That tranny knuckle-dragger is my fiancée.
jokes.setup: Uncle Jeff insults Shawnee with crude language
jokes.punchline: Jonah tries to defend her by repeating the insult
jokes.explanation: Shows Jonah's inability to properly defend anyone, but relies on crude language

jokes.text: I am pulling this creature from the jizz lagoon right off the New Hampshire congressional ballot
jokes.setup: Uncle Jeff explains he's removing Jonah from the ballot
jokes.punchline: He uses elaborate crude metaphor for Jonah's origin
jokes.explanation: Vivid and disgusting metaphor that perfectly captures Uncle Jeff's disdain

jokes.text: Ezra has more raw political talent in the tip of his rosy-head pecker than you have in this mangled abortion coat hanger you should be ashamed to call your body.
jokes.setup: Uncle Jeff compares Jonah to his cousin Ezra
jokes.punchline: He uses elaborate anatomical insults combining genitalia and abortion imagery
jokes.explanation: Extremely elaborate insult that's creative but relies heavily on shock value

jokes.text: Is that before or after I scheduled the surgery to cut my dick off so you could marry me?
jokes.setup: Shawnee says she's been having doubts 'for a little while'
jokes.punchline: Jonah reveals he got circumcised for her in the worst possible timing
jokes.explanation: Perfect culmination of the circumcision storyline with devastating timing

jokes.text: He wants to gargle my nuts and tickle my taint?
jokes.setup: Leon West has been calling repeatedly
jokes.punchline: Selina imagines crude sexual requests from the journalist
jokes.explanation: Crude but fitting response that shows Selina's assumption about male motivations

jokes.text: Oh, the 'Lhasa Express' gives it five namastes.
jokes.setup: Discussion of book reviews coming in
jokes.punchline: Tibetan newspaper uses 'namastes' instead of stars for rating system
jokes.explanation: Clever cultural reference that works as both callback and cultural observation

jokes.text: Yes, in sleeping with my trainer, I did not exercise good judgment.
jokes.setup: Selina is asked about her trainer scandal on Tonight Show
jokes.punchline: She delivers Amy's pun about exercise and judgment
jokes.explanation: Callback to Amy's earlier joke, shows Selina using the material despite rejecting it

jokes.text: Leon West will not let go. He follows me around and thinks about me 24/7, nonstop. Cuckoo.
jokes.setup: Final confessional about Leon West
jokes.punchline: Selina portrays the investigative journalist as obsessed rather than doing his job
jokes.explanation: Perfect ending that shows Selina's complete denial and lack of accountability
